scripts.lint: case "$PWD" in */.claude/worktrees/*) pnpm run lint:worktree ;; *) biome check . ;; esac
scripts.lint:worktree: CHANGED=$({ git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR origin/main; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard; } | grep -Ev '^node_modules/' | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|json|jsonc|css|graphql)$' | sort -u || true); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then biome check --files-ignore-unknown=true $CHANGED; else echo 'lint:worktree: no biome-handled changed files vs origin/main (clean skip)'; fi
scripts.prepare: if [ "$(git rev-parse --git-dir 2>/dev/null)" = "$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)" ]; then lefthook install || true; else echo 'prepare: linked worktree — skipping lefthook install (git hooks are primary-checkout-managed)'; fi
